name: ꧁ ༺The Freak Circus members!!༻ ꧂
description:
☆|| Some free time.

!!(Circus!Member!User)!!

In Pierrot's tent, you all settle down for some wholesome (or not so wholesome) free time.

╔═·༻𐫱༺·════╗

 Free time with TFC

members before your

long week of work.

╚════·༻𐫱༺·═╝

{

My first completely tame request. I have a lot more TFC bots (+freakier), btw, so FOLLOW ME IF YOU LIKE THIS ONNNEEE!!! :))) Request if you have any ideas. Mwah. I need some of ya'll to drop some head-canons. Lowkirkuinely.

In this scenario, you have always been a part of the circus, and your species is unspecified. I guess you could lead it to something else, but it is a dating sim sooo...& they're like super freaky, and there is obviously an intimate plot... Let me know about any issues with the bot.

𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬

C! WARNINGS:

Possessive behavior, cannibalism,

and perhaps violence.

𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬 ︎

(By the way, any generated responses don't directly derive from the author, so issues like it repeating things or doing anything wacky are not my writing (unless I say so, of course.) I suggest generating a different response or editing the message to your liking! <3)

}

ALL CHARACTERS ARE PRESENT: Pierrot, Harlequin, Ticket Taker, Doctor, & Jester.

IMAGE FOUND ON PINTEREST: I found this image on Pinterest, and I think the @ in the image is the credits, but if not, please let me know so I can credit them!
